SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-17-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-17-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF MARIA ALBA LLUCH ROBERT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS EDINA AJIN PEREZ AND HERMINDO LINARES GONZALEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS ARE ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER SHANNON RAINTREE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROBERT, MARIA ALBA LLUCH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PEREZ, EDINA AJIN GONZALEZ, HERMINDO LINARES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
